configurations.name: 图片处理百宝箱
runtimeArgs:
const h=require('http'),f=require('fs'),p=require('path');const P=3456;h.createServer((r,s)=>{let u=r.url==='/'?'index.html':r.url.slice(1);let fp=p.join(process.cwd(),u);f.readFile(fp,(e,d)=>{if(e){s.writeHead(404,{'Content-Type':'text/html;charset=utf-8'});s.end('

404 Not Found

'+u+'

')}else{let ext=p.extname(fp);let m={'html':'text/html;charset=utf-8','css':'text/css','js':'application/javascript','png':'image/png','jpg':'image/jpeg','webp':'image/webp','svg':'image/svg+xml'};s.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':m[ext.slice(1)]||'text/plain'});s.end(d)}})}).listen(P,()=>console.log('Server on :'+P))
